blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There's less than a month left until the semester ends.
The practical exams were over, and only the theoretical exams were left.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Since he will be entering his senior year next semester, he had to think that if not during this period, he would have no time to reinforce his basics.
Logically, he knew that, but his emotions weren't as easy to control.
Shirone was usually unwavering no matter what happens, but he couldn't focus on his studies when it involved his parents.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's why, as soon as class ended, he entered the research group and became lost in thought.
Nade opened the door to the research group and came in.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Hey, Shirone, we got you some donuts.
